title: Bitcoin slides as Iran ceasefire collapse sees $75 oil on Hormuz blockade threats
summary: Bitcoin price pressure took BTC toward the "crucial" $61,000 mark as oil prices soared on the collapse of the US-Iran ceasefire.

title: Bull Bitcoin asks French court to strike down DAC8 implementing decree
summary: The non-custodial Bitcoin exchange petitioned to annul a French decree implementing DAC8, arguing the rules could create surveillance and physical risks for up to 135 million European crypto holders.

title: Stocks Fall as US-Iran Jitters Spur Rally in Oil: Markets Wrap
summary: A flare-up in geopolitical risks sent stocks and bonds lower as oil jumped after President Donald Trump said a ceasefire with Iran may be over, adding the US would probably launch further strikes.

title: Shipowners Assess Hormuz-Transit Risk as US-Iran Deal Crumbles
summary: Shipowners painted a mixed picture of their willingness to continue transiting the Strait of Hormuz in the hours after President Donald Trump said the US ceasefire with Iran is “over.”

title: Bull Bitcoin Files Landmark Legal Challenge to Annul France’s DAC8 Crypto Data Surveillance Rules
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bull Bitcoin Files Landmark Legal Challenge to Annul France’s DAC8 Crypto Data Surveillance Rules

title: Schwab Strategist Backs Strategy’s STRC Playbook Amid Bitcoin Weakness
summary:

Schwab Strategist Backs Strategy’s STRC Playbook Amid Bitcoin Weakness
Schwab strategist Jim Ferraioli said Strategy's recent preferred stock actions have eased near-term liquidity concerns despite Bitcoin's decline.

title: Lucky Trader Turns $85 Into $2 Million on Robinhood Chain Meme Coin
summary: The meme coin CashCat on Robinhood Chain is the latest flavor of the hour, and one trader has turned a mini-investment into a small fortune in less than three weeks.

title: BNB Chain Plans New Layer-1 for AI Agents and Quantum Future
summary: The network’s 2026 roadmap targets faster transactions, AI-powered apps, and infrastructure aimed at competing with traditional financial systems, while preparing for a quantum future.

title: Paradigm raises $1.2 billion fourth fund, expanding beyond crypto into AI and robotics
summary: Crypto venture firm Paradigm has raised its fourth fund, a $1.2 billion vehicle that will invest in crypto, AI, robotics, and other startups.

title: European Commission looks to expand MiCA to cover emergence of tokenization, non-EU stablecoin issuers: report
summary: The European Commission is reportedly seeking comment from stakeholders on expanding MiCA rules until Sept. 30.

title: Trump says ceasefire with Iran is ‘over’ and warns of further strikes
summary: Oil surges more than 8 per cent to exceed $80 a barrel after US president says negotiating with Tehran is a ‘waste of time’

title: Why the US and Iran are stuck in a cycle of tit-for-tat strikes
summary: Trump’s push to get ships moving through the Strait of Hormuz keeps colliding with Tehran’s resistance to cede control
